item.title: December Newsletter
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> SASIP December Newsletter AGU Special Edition! View this email in your browser SASIP Newsletter December 2024 AGU Special Edition Follow Us Subscribe AGU SASIP Highlights News AGU SASIP HighlightsWeвҖҷre thrilled to share that exciting research from our project will be showcased at AGU24 in Washington D.C. from December 9вҖ“13! Cryosphere вқ„пёҸMonday 9th 16:42 (C14A-05): Simon Driscoll creates the first observational emulator of melt ponds on Arctic sea ice using machine learning (Abstract).

item.title: November Newsletter
item.description: <!DOCTYPE html> SASIP November Newsletter Latest news from SASIP View this email in your browser SASIP Newsletter November 2024 Follow Us Subscribe Science Spotlights Science Update News Science SpotlightsGenerative Diffusion for Regional Surrogate Models From Sea-Ice SimulationsIn their new paper published in Journal of Advances in Modeling Earth Systems, Tobias Finn et al. introduce generative AI,В which has similarly revolutionised image generation from text, to predict the evolution of sea ice in a region north of Svalbard.

item.title: July Newsletter
item.description: SASIP July Newsletter Campaign URL Copy Twitter 0 tweets Subscribe Past Issues RSS Translate English Ш§Щ„Ш№ШұШЁЩҠШ© Afrikaans РұРөР»Р°СҖСғСҒРәР°СҸ РјРҫРІР° РұСҠР»РіР°СҖСҒРәРё catalГ дёӯж–ҮпјҲз®ҖдҪ“пјү дёӯж–ҮпјҲз№Ғй«”пјү Hrvatski ДҢesky Dansk eesti keel Nederlands Suomi Français Deutsch ΕλληνικО® аӨ№аӨҝаӨЁаҘҚаӨҰаҘҖ Magyar Gaeilge Indonesia Гӯslenska Italiano ж—Ҙжң¬иӘһ бһ—бһ¶бһҹбһ¶бһҒбҹ’бһҳбҹӮбһҡ н•ңкөӯм–ҙ РјР°РәРөРҙРҫРҪСҒРәРё СҳР°Р·РёРә ШЁЩҮШ§Ші Щ…Щ„Ш§ЩҠЩҲ Malti Norsk Polski Português Português - Portugal RomânДғ Р СғСҒСҒРәРёР№ Español Kiswahili Svenska ЧўЧ‘ЧЁЧҷЧӘ LietuviЕі latvieЕЎu slovenДҚina slovenЕЎДҚina СҒСҖРҝСҒРәРё а®Өа®®а®ҝа®ҙаҜҚ аё аёІаё©аёІа№„аё—аёў TГјrkГ§e Filipino СғРәСҖР°С—МҒРҪСҒСҢРәР° Tiбәҝng Viб»Үt Latest news from SASIP View this email in your browser
